name: Chicken and Sausage Gumbo
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound chicken breasts, cooked and shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare chicken breasts and shred. Set aside.
2. Brown sausage, onion, and green pepper in a skillet. Drain the fat.
3. In a Crock-Pot, combine shredded chicken, sausage mixture, celery, water, and seasonings.
4. Cover and cook on Low for 6 to 8 hours or on High for 3 to 4 hours.
5. Serve over rice and garnish with sliced green onions.
Serves 8 to 10
